items.name_cn:
Celine
New Box New (Arc de Triomphe) Monogram Envelope Bag. Everyone knows Celine changed designers. The biggest difference between this new model and the old one is the button. The 20s early spring runway style perfectly combines vintage elements with the signature clean lines, radiating a brand-new charming appeal. Size 20-11.5-6cm
